description: Advanced settlement contract with per-developer balance tracking. Receives USDC forwarded by the vault and credits either a shared global pool or an individual developer's balance.

errors.description: Typed error codes emitted via env.panic_with_error(). Callers and indexers match on the u32 code rather than parsing raw strings.

variants.name: NotInitialized
variants.when: A function is called before init.

variants.name: AlreadyInitialized
variants.when: init is called more than once.

variants.name: Unauthorized
variants.when: Caller is not the registered vault or admin.

variants.name: DeveloperRequired
variants.when: to_pool=false but no developer address was supplied.

variants.name: DeveloperMustBeNone
variants.when: to_pool=true but a developer address was given.

variants.name: PoolOverflow
variants.when: Global pool i128 addition would overflow.

variants.name: DeveloperOverflow
variants.when: Developer balance i128 addition would overflow.

DeveloperBalance.description: Snapshot of a single developer's tracked balance.

balance.description: Credited balance in USDC base units (stroops).

total_balance.description: Total USDC credited to the global pool.

last_updated.description: Ledger timestamp of the last pool update.

PaymentReceivedEvent.description: Event payload emitted on every receive_payment call.

from_vault.description: Address of the caller (typically the vault).

amount.description: Payment amount in USDC base units.

to_pool.description: True when credited to the global pool; false when credited to a developer.

developer.description: Developer address when to_pool=false; null otherwise.

BalanceCreditedEvent.description: Event payload emitted when a developer balance is increased (to_pool=false).

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initialize the settlement contract. Can only be called once. Sets admin, registers the vault address, creates an empty developer balance map, and initializes the global pool.
functions.access: any (no auth requirement on init itself; admin address is stored)

params.name: admin
params.description: Address that may call set_admin and set_vault.

params.name: vault_address
params.description: Vault contract address permitted to call receive_payment.

functions.name: receive_payment
functions.description: Receive a payment from the vault and credit the global pool or a specific developer. The caller must be the registered vault or the admin.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the registered vault or admin; must authorize.

params.name: amount
params.description: Payment amount in USDC base units; must be > 0.

params.name: to_pool
params.description: If true, credit the global pool. If false, credit the specified developer.

params.name: developer
params.description: Required when to_pool=false; the developer to credit. Ignored when to_pool=true.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.when: Caller is neither the vault nor the admin.

errors.name: DeveloperMustBeNone
errors.when: to_pool=true and developer is not null.

errors.name: PoolOverflow
errors.when: Global pool i128 addition would overflow.

errors.name: DeveloperOverflow
errors.when: Developer balance i128 addition would overflow.

functions.name: get_developer_balance
functions.description: Return the tracked USDC balance for a developer. Returns 0 if the developer has never received a payment.

functions.name: get_all_developer_balances
functions.description: Return a list of all developer balances. Admin only; may be expensive if the index is large.

functions.name: get_global_pool
functions.description: Return the global pool state (total balance and timestamp of last update).

functions.name: get_pending_admin
functions.description: Return the pending admin address, or null if no two-step transfer is in progress. Integrators can poll this to detect an in-flight admin handover before accept_admin is called.

functions.name: get_vault
functions.description: Return the registered vault contract address.

functions.name: set_admin
functions.description: Nominate a new admin. The nominee must call accept_admin to finalize.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.when: Caller is not the current admin.

functions.name: accept_admin
functions.description: Finalize the admin transfer. Must be called by the pending admin.
panics: "no admin transfer pending" — set_admin was not called first.

functions.name: set_vault
functions.description: Update the registered vault address. Only admin may call this.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.when: Caller is not the current admin.
